ResourceHeader.Description:
The Athabasca University THEMIS UCLA Magnetometer Network
   is a magnetometer array located mainly in Quebec, Canada.
ResourceHeader.Acknowledgement:
AUTUMNX magnetometer network is funded through the Canadian Space Agency / Geospace Observatory (GO) Canada program
Athabasca University, Centre for Science / Faculty of Science and Technology, 2014
